channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Trump’s retribution? What to watch in today’s elections in Indiana, Ohio and Michigan
item.description: President Donald Trump’s campaign to politically punish Republicans who stand in his way moves through Indiana on Tuesday night, when seven state senators face Trump-backed primary challengers.

item.title: Tennessee Republicans will consider redrawing US House district covering majority-Black Memphis
Restaurants celebrate authentic Mexican culture and history this Cinco de Mayo
